languages.text: "И ни капли раскаяния — только страх за свою шкуру. Не ведитесь на слезы преступницы, я видел их достаточно, и они ничего не стоят. Хотя нет — на одну пулю хватит".

traits.locale_text: "Исключено. Ты обвиняешься в пособничестве преступнику и будешь казнена, как и он".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."
languages.original_text: "И ни капли раскаяния — только страх за свою шкуру. Не ведитесь на слезы преступницы, я видел их достаточно, и они ничего не стоят. Хотя нет — на одну пулю хватит".

traits.locale_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen many of those, and they are worth nothing. Or should I rather say, not worth more than a bullet."

"And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen many of those, and they are worth nothing. Or should I rather say, not worth more than a bullet."

"And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

languages.text: “她的心中没有一丝悔恨，仅仅在担心她自己的安危。不要让罪人的泪水动摇你的决心，这种场面我见得多了。罪人的眼泪一文不值，或者说，最多只值一颗子弹。”
languages.original_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

traits.locale_text: “她的心中没有一丝悔恨，仅仅在担心她自己的安危。不要让罪人的泪水动摇你的决心，这种场面我见得多了。罪人的眼泪一文不值，或者说，最多只值一颗子弹。”

languages.text: 「では、少しの良心の呵責もありません。ただ、彼女の姿のままでいることを恐れているだけです。犯罪者の涙に心を揺さぶられてはいけません。そういう人をたくさん見てきましたが、意味はありません。むしろ、銃弾以上の価値はないと言うべきでしょう」
languages.original_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

traits.locale_text: 「では、少しの良心の呵責もありません。ただ、彼女の姿のままでいることを恐れているだけです。犯罪者の涙に心を揺さぶられてはいけません。そういう人をたくさん見てきましたが、意味はありません。むしろ、銃弾以上の価値はないと言うべきでしょう」

languages.text: «Y ni un solo ápice de remordimiento. Solo teme por su vida. No se deje conmover por las lágrimas de una criminal. He visto muchas así, y nunca valen nada. O tal vez debería decir que no valen más que una bala».
languages.original_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

traits.locale_text: «Y ni un solo ápice de remordimiento. Solo teme por su vida. No se deje conmover por las lágrimas de una criminal. He visto muchas así, y nunca valen nada. O tal vez debería decir que no valen más que una bala».

languages.text: "Zerre pişmanlık ibaresi yok. Sadece kendi canının derdinde. Timsah gözyaşlarına kanma. Bunun gibileri çok gördüm, beş para etmezler. Hatta... Kesilmeleri bir kurşuna bakar."
languages.original_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

traits.locale_text: "Zerre pişmanlık ibaresi yok. Sadece kendi canının derdinde. Timsah gözyaşlarına kanma. Bunun gibileri çok gördüm, beş para etmezler. Hatta... Kesilmeleri bir kurşuna bakar."

languages.text: « Et pas une once de remords. Elle craint uniquement pour sa propre vie. Ne vous laissez pas attendrir par les larmes d'une criminelle. J'en ai vu mon compte et je vous assure qu'elles sont sans valeur. Ou disons plutôt qu'elles ne valent guère plus qu'une balle. »
languages.original_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

traits.locale_text: « Et pas une once de remords. Elle craint uniquement pour sa propre vie. Ne vous laissez pas attendrir par les larmes d'une criminelle. J'en ai vu mon compte et je vous assure qu'elles sont sans valeur. Ou disons plutôt qu'elles ne valent guère plus qu'une balle. »

languages.text: "Und kein Hauch von Reue. Nur die Angst um die eigene Haut. Lasst Euch nicht von den Tränen einer Verbrecherin beeinflussen. Ich habe viele davon gesehen, und sie sind nichts wert. Oder besser, nicht mehr wert als eine Kugel."
languages.original_text: "And not a sliver of remorse. Just fear for her own skin. Do not be swayed by a criminal's tears. I have seen plenty of those, and they are worth nothing. Or, I should say, not worth more than a bullet."

traits.locale_text: "Und kein Hauch von Reue. Nur die Angst um die eigene Haut. Lasst Euch nicht von den Tränen einer Verbrecherin beeinflussen. Ich habe viele davon gesehen, und sie sind nichts wert. Oder besser, nicht mehr wert als eine Kugel."
